zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Paulet於大約1479年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾時，她的父親Sir John Paulet20歲，母親Elizabeth Capel24歲。她於1503年與William Gifford of itchell在英國哈普爾哈普-可洛斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年在英國哈普爾艾福紹特享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Paulet于大约1479年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾时，她的父亲Sir John Paulet20岁，母亲Elizabeth Capel24岁。她于1503年与William Gifford of itchell在英国哈普爾哈普-可洛斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年在英国哈普爾艾福紹特享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

nameMeanings.name: Paulet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of several places called Paules in the provinces of Zaragoza and Huesca in Aragon, and Albacete.

variants.name: Pavlis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Despina, Nikolaos, Vasilios.
Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Pavlos (see Paul ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Compare Paules and Paulis .
Czech and Slovak (also Pavliš); Croatian (Pavliš): derivative of the personal name Pavel (Slovak commonly Pavol, Croatian commonly Pavao), an equivalent of Paul . Compare Paulis .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Paulet was born about 1479, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Paulet, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Capel, was 24. She married William Gifford of itchell in 1503, in Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1520, in Ewshott, Hampshire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Paulet est née environ 1479, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Paulet, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Capel, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William Gifford of itchell en 1503, à Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1520, à Ewshott, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Old Basing, Hampshire, England: Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Paulet um 1479 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Paulet 20 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Capel 24. Sie hat 1503 in Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, England William Gifford of itchell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Ewshott, Hampshire, England und wurde in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Paulet è nata il circa 1479 nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Paulet, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Capel, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William Gifford of itchell nel 1503, nel Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1520, nel Ewshott, Hampshire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Basing, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Pauletが約1479年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Pauletは20歳，母Elizabeth Capelは24歳であった。1503年にイギリスハンプシュアイアハンプシュアイレ-クロスでWilliam Gifford of itchellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年にイギリスハンプシュアイアエウショットで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Paulet(이)가 대략 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Paulet(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Capel(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1503년 영국 함프실르 함프실레-크로스에서 William Gifford of itchell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 함프실르 w쇼트에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 드 바징에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Paulet nasceu aproximadamente 1479, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Paulet, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Capel, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William Gifford of itchell em 1503, em Hampshire-Cross, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1520, em Ewshott, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Old Basing, Hampshire, England: Old Basing, Hampshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Paulet родилась около 1479 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Paulet было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Capel, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Gifford of itchell в 1503 г. в местности хампшире-кросс, хампшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1520 г. в местности ювшотт, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.
